summary: Comprehensive testing of WhatsApp and Email notification feature for ticket detail page. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests all passed - Settings page shows all phone/email fields, Ticket detail page shows notification panel with 5 team options (Engineer, Backend, Billing, Parts, Quote), each with WA and Email badges. WhatsApp opens correctly when notification button clicked.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns all phone fields (billing_team_phone, parts_order_phone, quote_team_phone, backend_team_phone)
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns all email list fields (billing_emails, parts_order_emails, quote_team_emails)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings saves and loads all phone numbers correctly
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings saves and loads all email lists correctly
Backend: POST /api/ticketing/tickets/{id}/send-notification with notification_type='assigned' returns engineer phone
Backend: POST /api/ticketing/tickets/{id}/send-notification with notification_type='billing' returns billing_team_phone (919111111111)
Backend: POST /api/ticketing/tickets/{id}/send-notification with notification_type='awaiting_parts' returns parts_order_phone (919222222222)
Backend: POST /api/ticketing/tickets/{id}/send-notification with notification_type='quote' returns quote_team_phone (919333333333)
Backend: POST /api/ticketing/tickets/{id}/send-notification with notification_type='general' returns backend_team_phone (919444444444)
Backend: Notification adds timeline entry with type='notification'
Backend: Invalid ticket ID returns 404
Backend: Unauthorized request returns 401/403
Backend: Billing notification uses correct billing_emails
Backend: Parts notification uses correct parts_order_emails
Backend: Quote notification uses correct quote_team_emails
Frontend: Settings page loads with data-testid='settings-page'
Frontend: Settings has billing-team-phone input field
Frontend: Settings has parts-order-phone input field
Frontend: Settings has quote-team-phone input field
Frontend: Settings has backend-team-phone input field
Frontend: Settings has billing-email-input and add button
Frontend: Settings has parts-order-email-input and add button
Frontend: Settings has quote-team-email-input and add button
Frontend: Settings has save-settings-btn
Frontend: Ticket detail page shows notification-panel in sidebar
Frontend: Notification panel shows 5 team options (Engineer, Backend, Billing, Parts, Quote)
Frontend: Engineer option shows sublabel with engineer name (e.g. T1_TestEngineer)
Frontend: Engineer option is highlighted/recommended when ticket is assigned
Frontend: Each notification option has WA badge
Frontend: Each notification option has Email badge
Frontend: Clicking notification button shows 'WhatsApp opened' toast
Frontend: Clicking notification shows result message with phone number and email status

notification_panel.result_display: Shows phone number used and email send status

whatsapp_integration.fallback: If no phone configured, message copied to clipboard

context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp and Email notification feature fully tested and working. Settings page at /admin/settings has all phone/email configuration fields. Ticket detail page sidebar shows 'Send Notification' panel with 5 team options. Clicking opens WhatsApp via wa.me/ link. SMTP not configured so email_sent=false but endpoint works correctly. Phone numbers are being returned correctly based on notification type. Timeline entries are added for each notification sent.
notes: SMTP is not configured in the test environment so email_sent will always be false, but the endpoint returns the correct email_to addresses based on settings. The wa.me/ links open correctly. The 'WhatsApp opened' toast confirms the window.open() call worked.
